# Knight Ops
> Knight Ops builds custom AI-powered systems, dashboards, workflows, and automations for founder-led service businesses — coaches, consultants, agencies, financial advisors, and community leaders — eliminating operational bottlenecks and creating leverage so founders can scale without chaos.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://knightops.biz/): Main landing page showcasing services, case studies, process, FAQ, and booking for Discovery Calls and Blueprint Sessions.
- [About](https://knightops.biz/about): About Daniel Knight, founder and systems architect. 20+ years experience, 50+ custom systems built, $80M+ business impact.
- [Blog](https://knightops.biz/blog): Expert articles on AI systems, business automation, operational efficiency, and custom technology for founder-led businesses.
- [Case Studies](https://knightops.biz/case-studies): Real results from custom AI systems — 93% time saved, #1 region nationally, $4.5M processed in 30 days.
- [App Vault](https://knightops.biz/vault): Marketplace of ready-to-deploy AI-powered business apps built by Knight Ops. Buy, deploy, generate value immediately.
- [Pricing](https://knightops.biz/pricing): Transparent pricing for all service tiers from free Discovery Call to $14,997 Night Build Pro.
- [Partners](https://knightops.biz/partners): Affiliate and referral partner program with 10% commissions, partner gifts, and dashboard access.
- [Apply](https://knightops.biz/apply): Development request intake form for custom app and website projects across Night Launch, Night Build, and Night Build Pro tiers.
- [Assessment](https://knightops.biz/assessment): Free Tech Type Assessment quiz that identifies builder personality (Architect, Vibe Coder, Blitz Builder, Scholar) and recommends AI tools.

## Services

- **Discovery Call** (Free): 30-minute exploratory conversation to identify biggest operational bottleneck.
- **Blueprint Session** ($750): 90-minute deep-dive architecture session where founder and client co-design the system live. Fee applied toward project.
- **Night Launch** ($1,497): High-converting multi-page website delivered overnight. HTML/CSS/JS, mobile responsive, SEO-ready.
- **Night Build** ($7,497): Full-stack web or mobile app with auth, payments, CRM integrations, deployed in 48 hours.
- **Night Build Pro** ($14,997): Everything in Night Build plus iOS App Store and Android Play Store submission with compliance review.

## Systems Built

- Executive Dashboards and KPI reporting
- Client Portals with secure document exchange
- CRM and Sales Pipeline systems
- Onboarding Automations (paper-to-digital)
- AI-Powered Internal Tools and assistants
- Partner and Affiliate tracking systems
- Event and Campaign management platforms
- Community and Membership platforms

## Key Results

- $80M+ business impact facilitated
- 93% reduction in client review prep time for $100M financial advisory book
- 12 car dealerships unified into #1 region nationally via KPI dashboard
- $75M+ in charitable contributions processed through automated pipeline
- $4.5M in CARES Act applications facilitated in 30 days
- Paper-to-digital onboarding deployed in 24 hours
- 85% average time saved on automated workflows

## Founder

- **Daniel Knight**: 20+ years in systems, 50+ custom systems built. Background spans multi-billion-dollar corporations, financial services, government programs, and entrepreneur ecosystems.
